name: Delivery Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for total delivery cost analysis per shipment, incorporating Lean logistics, Six Sigma variability, and WERC warehousing standards.

inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total route distance from origin to destination, used for fuel and time cost calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total route distance from origin to destination, used for fuel and time cost calculations.

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Current average fuel price per liter, directly impacts variable transport cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current average fuel price per liter, directly impacts variable transport cost.

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency (km/L)
inputs.businessContext: Vehicle fuel consumption rate in kilometers per liter, key for fuel cost estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vehicle fuel consumption rate in kilometers per liter, key for fuel cost estimation.

inputs.label: Driver Wage per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of the driver, including benefits and overtime provisions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage of the driver, including benefits and overtime provisions.

inputs.label: Average Speed (km/h)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average travel speed including traffic and stops, used to compute travel time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average travel speed including traffic and stops, used to compute travel time.

inputs.label: Load Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of cargo, affects fuel consumption and handling costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of cargo, affects fuel consumption and handling costs.

inputs.label: Handling Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost for loading/unloading and warehouse handling per kilogram of cargo.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost for loading/unloading and warehouse handling per kilogram of cargo.

inputs.label: Vehicle Maintenance per km
inputs.businessContext: Average maintenance cost per kilometer, including tires, oil, and repairs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average maintenance cost per kilometer, including tires, oil, and repairs.

inputs.label: Toll Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total toll charges along the route, if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total toll charges along the route, if applicable.

inputs.label: Insurance Rate per kg
inputs.businessContext: Insurance premium per kilogram of cargo value, covering risk during transit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Insurance premium per kilogram of cargo value, covering risk during transit.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs (administration, IT, facilities) as a percentage of direct costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect costs (administration, IT, facilities) as a percentage of direct costs.

inputs.label: Express Delivery
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a premium multiplier to reflect expedited service costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a premium multiplier to reflect expedited service costs.

inputs.label: Delivery Zone
inputs.businessContext: Geographic zone classification affecting last-mile complexity and cost multipliers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Geographic zone classification affecting last-mile complexity and cost multipliers.

rules.message: Fuel efficiency outside typical range (2-40 km/L). Verify input.
Load weight exceeds standard truck capacity (25,000 kg). Consider heavy-haul equipment.
Express delivery to remote zone may incur additional surcharges.

thresholds.message: Fuel cost is above 2.5 currency/L. Consider fuel surcharge or route optimization.
Total delivery cost exceeds 5000 currency. Review cost drivers for reduction opportunities.
Cost per kg exceeds 5 currency. Benchmark against industry average (WERC).

formulas.name: Fuel Cost
formulas.description: Total fuel expense for the trip.

formulas.name: Driver Cost
formulas.description: Labor cost based on travel time.

formulas.name: Maintenance Cost
formulas.description: Vehicle maintenance expense for the trip.

formulas.name: Insurance Cost
formulas.description: Insurance premium for cargo during transit.

formulas.name: Direct Cost
formulas.description: Sum of all direct variable costs.
formulas.formula: fuel_cost + driver_cost + handling_cost + maintenance_cost + insurance_cost + toll_cost

formulas.name: Overhead Cost
formulas.description: Indirect costs allocated to this delivery.

formulas.name: Zone Multiplier
formulas.description: Last-mile complexity factor based on delivery zone.
formulas.formula: CASE delivery_zone WHEN 'urban' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'suburban' THEN 1.15 WHEN 'rural' THEN 1.3 WHEN 'remote' THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.0 END

formulas.name: Express Multiplier
formulas.formula: CASE is_express_delivery WHEN true THEN 1.25 ELSE 1.0 END

formulas.name: Total Delivery Cost
formulas.description: Primary result: total cost per shipment including all adjustments.

primary.label: Total Delivery Cost
primary.description: Final cost per shipment after all adjustments.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Empty Return Miles
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated cost of deadhead miles if return trip is not utilized.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Waiting Time Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of driver idle time at loading/unloading points (Lean waste).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Damage Risk Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Expected loss from cargo damage based on Six Sigma defect rate (3.4 per million).

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Route
suggestedActions.description: Reduce distance by 10% through route planning to lower fuel and maintenance costs.

suggestedActions.label: Consolidate Shipments
suggestedActions.description: Increase load factor to reduce cost per kg (Lean principle).

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate Fuel Surcharge
suggestedActions.description: If fuel cost exceeds threshold, apply surcharge to customer.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Overhead
suggestedActions.description: Target overhead percentage reduction by 2% through process improvement (Six Sigma DMAIC).
